name: nanomem-codex
description: Connect Codex to NanoMem long-term personal memory through hooks and optional read-only MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Read and capture long-term personal memory.
interface.longDescription: Adds NanoMem as a sidecar memory layer for Codex. Hooks inject relevant personal memory before a turn and capture user-visible dialogue after a turn. Read-only MCP lookup can be configured separately.
defaultPrompt: Recall my relevant personal preferences with NanoMem
